records.question: Which episodes titled "Eeny Teeny Maya Moe" have an episode number of 16, a rating of exactly 7.1, at least 436 in the series, no more than 948 votes, won an award in 2009, and are associated with the keyword "little person"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
WHERE episode.rating = 7.1 AND episode.number_in_series >= 436 AND episode.title = 'Eeny Teeny Maya Moe' AND episode.episode = 16 AND award.year = 2009 AND episode.votes <= 948 AND keyword.keyword = 'little person'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Award a ON e.episode_id = a.episode_id
JOIN Keyword k ON e.episode_id = k.episode_id
WHERE e.title = 'Eeny Teeny Maya Moe'
  AND e.episode = 16
  AND e.rating = 7.1
  AND e.number_in_series >= 436
  AND e.votes <= 948
  AND a.year = 2009
  AND a.result = 'Won'
  AND k.keyword = 'little person'

records.question: Which episodes have an episode number at least 13, a season number at most 20, the title exactly "Gone Maggie Gone", have received an award with the award name exactly "Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)" from the organization exactly "Primetime Emmy Awards", and also have related keyword records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
WHERE episode.episode >= 13 AND award.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)' AND episode.season <= 20 AND episode.title = 'Gone Maggie Gone' AND award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Award a ON e.episode_id = a.episode_id
JOIN Keyword k ON e.episode_id = k.episode_id
WHERE e.episode >= 13
  AND e.season <= 20
  AND e.title = 'Gone Maggie Gone'
  AND a.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)'
  AND a.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards'

records.question: Which episodes titled Father Knows Worst have an episode number of 18, a rating exactly 7.0, aired on or before 2009-04-26, and belong to season 20 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.rating = 7.0 AND episode.season <= 20 AND episode.title = 'Father Knows Worst' AND episode.episode = 18 AND episode.air_date <= '2009-04-26'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE title = 'Father Knows Worst'
  AND episode = 18
  AND rating = 7.0
  AND air_date <= '2009-04-26'
  AND season <= 20

records.question: Which episodes have a rating of exactly 6.6 and aired on or before 2008-12-07?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.rating = 6.6 AND episode.air_date <= '2008-12-07'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE rating = 6.6 AND air_date <= '2008-12-07'

records.question: What episodes titled Sex, Pies and Idiot Scrapes have a rating of 7.2, exactly 1192 votes, are first episodes from seasons at most 20, aired on or before 2008-09-28, and include '224' in their episode image?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.episode_image LIKE '%224%' AND episode.season <= 20 AND episode.rating = 7.2 AND episode.episode = 1 AND episode.air_date <= '2008-09-28' AND episode.title = 'Sex, Pies and Idiot Scrapes' AND episode.votes = 1192
records.pred_sql:
SELECT episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE title = 'Sex, Pies and Idiot Scrapes'
  AND rating = 7.2
  AND votes = 1192
  AND episode = 1
  AND season <= 20
  AND air_date <= '2008-09-28'
  AND episode_image LIKE '%224%'

records.question: Which episodes have the exact title No Loan Again, Naturally and include credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.title = 'No Loan Again, Naturally'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
INNER JOIN Credit c ON e.episode_id = c.episode_id
WHERE e.title = 'No Loan Again, Naturally'

records.question: Which episodes titled Four Great Women and a Manicure aired on or before 2009-05-10, are from season 20 or earlier with episode number at least 20, have exactly 927 votes, and feature a credited Mr. Burns role?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.air_date <= '2009-05-10' AND episode.title = 'Four Great Women and a Manicure' AND credit.role = 'Mr. Burns' AND credit.credited = 'true' AND episode.season <= 20 AND episode.episode >= 20 AND episode.votes = 927
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Credit c ON e.episode_id = c.episode_id
WHERE e.title = 'Four Great Women and a Manicure'
  AND e.air_date <= '2009-05-10'
  AND e.season <= 20
  AND e.episode >= 20
  AND e.votes = 927
  AND c.role = 'Mr. Burns'
  AND c.credited = 'true'

records.question: Which episodes aired on or after 2009-03-15 with at least 1049 votes won a Primetime Emmy where the role was exactly animation timer?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
WHERE award.award_category = 'Primetime Emmy' AND award.role = 'animation timer' AND episode.air_date >= '2009-03-15' AND episode.votes >= 1049
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Award a ON e.episode_id = a.episode_id
WHERE e.air_date >= '2009-03-15'
  AND e.votes >= 1049
  AND a.result = 'Won'
  AND a.award LIKE '%Primetime Emmy%'
  AND a.role = 'animation timer'

records.question: Which episodes have an award with the role exactly equal to 'animation timer' and also have at least one associated keyword?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
WHERE award.role = 'animation timer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Award a ON e.episode_id = a.episode_id
JOIN Keyword k ON e.episode_id = k.episode_id
WHERE a.role = 'animation timer'

records.question: What episodes are associated with the person whose birth name is exactly Marc Edward Wilmore?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN person ON award.person = person.name
WHERE person.birth_name = 'Marc Edward Wilmore'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Credit c ON e.episode_id = c.episode_id
JOIN Person p ON c.person = p.name
WHERE p.birth_name = 'Marc Edward Wilmore'
